title: Ability to add Titles or Title Widget to Dashboards (outisde of text widget which doesn't look very aesthetic)
excerpt: It would be great to have a more aesthetic way to create Titles in Dashboards. I currently use the Text widget, drag it so it is full screen length and make the text large to section out certain sections of the Dashboard…

posts.author: LacyMg (LacyGrimes)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have a more aesthetic way to create Titles in Dashboards. I currently use the Text widget, drag it so it is full screen length and make the text large to section out certain sections of the Dashboard, ie. to indicate clearly you are scrolling down into a section of Labour related charts.

posts.author: monica.chan (Monica Chan)
posts.cookedHtml: hi! are there any updates on this feature?
